fixture.title: Catalog Recorded Importer Fixtures
fixture.summary: Synthetic VNDB dump and Epic Games Store recorded-response fixtures for deterministic external-source importer verification without live network access.

license.evidence: Hand-authored synthetic VNDB-shaped dump rows and EGS-shaped recorded responses; no third-party raw assets, private catalog payloads, or credentials.

provenance.author: Itotori contributors

aggregateStats.notes: Covers VNDB external ids, titles, releases, language facts, source-version provenance, EGS product ids, store metadata, locale facts, fetched-at/request identity provenance, importer seed targets, and CATALOG-065 idempotent reruns.
